title: hero-vibe-kit session state
description: Observable workflow pointer written by phase-handoff at every real phase boundary. Agents write this; doctor reads it; the commit gate checks it. Authoritative state lives in handoff artifacts and ACTIVE_STATE.md — this file is a derived convenience pointer.

workItem.description: Slug or identifier of the current work item

path.description: Active workflow path from AGENCY_WORKFLOW router

reportSlug.description: Directory name under docs/reports/ for this work item

canonicalHandoff.description: Path to the latest handoff artifact

resumePath.description: Path to resume.md — the hot-path entry point for fresh sessions

nextAction.description: First concrete action for the next phase

lastCheckpoint.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of last session write (reserved)
